---
title: 'Transfer to Sales'
date: '2013-05-06T02:41:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Egg Head Antics'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4462473127399831010'
blogger_filename: '/2013/05/transfer-to-sales.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Egg Head Antics/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Transfer'
  - 'Sales'
---

<h4 style="text-align: center;">
Transfer to Sales</h4>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sales-transfer-no-27732dcfb58a.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sales-transfer-no-27732dcfb58a.png" /></a></div>
<br />
